title: eria extinctoria
intro: Eria extinctoria, also known as Coelogyne extinctoria, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eria extinctoria are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Eria extinctoria include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and roots in hot water to extract its medicinal properties.
